nasb.text: When the multitude is carried away, his heart will be lifted up, and he will cause tens of thousands to fall; yet he will not prevail.

esv.text: And when the multitude is taken away, his heart shall be exalted, and he shall cast down tens of thousands, but he shall not prevail.

cnv.text: 這大軍被掃除以後，南方王就心高氣傲；他雖然使千萬人倒斃，他的勝利卻不能持久。

ccb.text: 南方王获胜后必心高气傲，杀戮成千上万的人，但他的胜利不能持久。
